name: Green Beans and Carrots with Onion Dill Dressing
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces green beans, cut into 2-inch pieces
1 tablespoon fresh dill, or 1/4 teaspoon dried dill
recipeInstructions:
1. Add beans and carrots to boiling, salted water.
2. Reduce heat.
3. Cover and simmer for 10-15 minutes until crisp-tender.
4. Drain the vegetables.
5. In a small skillet, sauté onion in oil or bacon fat until tender.
6. Add vinegar, dill, and pepper to the onion mixture.
7. Toss the cooked vegetables with the dressing.
8. Serve hot.
